title: onosma yamagatae
intro: Onosma yamagatae, also known as Japanese swallowwort, is a perennial plant species within the family Apocynaceae, native to East Asia, particularly in China and Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce perspiration and reduce fever, making it a traditional remedy for treating conditions such as malaria and rheumatism. The health benefits of Onosma yamagatae include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and body pain. In herbal preparations, the roots and stems of Onosma yamagatae are often dried and used to make tea or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
